'''Randal Berger''' is a [[Wikipedia:Voice acting|voice artist]] who portrayed [[Kyle Katarn]] in the audio dramatizations of ''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]'', ''[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent]]'' and ''[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight]]''.<ref name="Dark Forces">[[Dark Forces: The Collector's Trilogy|''Dark Forces'' audio dramas]]</ref>

==WorkS==

|-
| [[1998]] || [[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'']] ||Kyle Katarn<ref name="Rebel Agent">[[Dark Forces: Rebel Agent (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Rebel Agent'' audio drama]]</ref>
|-
| 1998 || [[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'']]||Kyle Katarn<ref name="Jedi Knight">[[Dark Forces: Jedi Knight (audio drama)|''Dark Forces: Jedi Knight'' audio drama]]</ref>
